overview: A freelance contract fee estimator that uses bottom-up pricing — helping freelancers quote fair, profitable rates by accounting for taxes, expenses, complexity, and scope creep. Built for TIGOY.com/FeeEstimate.
features: Bottom-up pricing calculator with complexity multiplier slider
Tax transparency: shows exact tax set-aside and take-home profit
Pie chart breakdown of Tax vs Profit vs Expenses
Industry presets (Graphic Design, Software Dev, Consulting)
Safety margin toggle for scope creep protection
Advertisement banners with external image loading
